title: Speed Slider
description: this mod added a simple slider that can control player's movespeed.
body:
Just a simple mod

Added a slider that allows limiting (or boosting) the player's movement speed, ranging from **0.1× to 2.0×**. This is mainly intended to address situations in multi-mod environments where equipment stacking causes the player's movement speed to become excessively fast, making gameplay uncomfortable.

**Default key** to open the slider is **"N"**. You can change it in the menu.
